item.title: JPMorgan's Kinexys Blockchain Hits $4 Trillion, Adds Five APAC Currencies
item.description: J.P. Morgan's Kinexys blockchain payments platform has processed more than $4 trillion in transactions since launch and expanded to eight currencies, adding the Australian dollar, Hong Kong dollar, Japanese yen, Chinese renminbi and Singapore dollar to serve institutional clients across

item.title: Ansem Airdrops $7M of $ANSEM Memecoin in Bid to Reach 1M Holders
item.description: The Solana influencer has sent roughly $6.7M in tokens to more than 700 wallets onchain, even as he controls about 60% of the supply.

item.title: Top DeFi protocols by Holders Revenue over the past week. The top 10 protocols comprise over 80% of revenue passed on to tokenholders:

item.title: Stream Finance Starts Collecting Creditor Claims in Step Toward 'Global Resolution'
item.description: The collapsed yield protocol, whose November failure froze roughly $160 million in deposits and left an estimated $285 million owed across DeFi lending markets, is asking potential creditors to submit claim information through an online form

item.title: Introducing the RWA perp funding dashboard. This new tool lets you track cross venue funding rates, backtest the arbitrage between exchanges, and more. Check it out for free here! https://delphi.link/

item.title: Pump.fun's PUMP Buybacks Top $400M as Token Stays Flat
item.description: The Solana launchpad's repurchases since July now exceed $400M, yet PUMP trades roughly 83% below its record and is little changed on the day

item.title: CFTC Expands Polymarket Probe to Staged Trades and Fake Wins
item.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission is conducting a broad investigation into Polymarket covering staged trades and fake winning bets, Bloomberg reported Friday, advancing the agency’s scrutiny beyond the platform’s prior influencer scheme.

item.title: DraftKings Launches Proprietary Prediction Markets Exchange With $3.4B Annualized Consumer Volume
item.description: DraftKings has launched DKeX, a proprietary prediction markets exchange, reporting $3.4 billion in annualized consumer volume as it enters a field increasingly crowded by Kalshi, Polymarket, Meta Arena, and Robinhood.

item.title: OKX and Coinbase Race to Sign Up Binance's Displaced EU Users Before MiCA Deadline
item.description: OKX is offering EEA users deposit bonuses of up to 8% and Coinbase has launched a parallel transfer bonus for subscribers in eight European markets, as both licensed exchanges compete to capture users displaced by Binance's July 1 MiCA wind-down.

item.title: BNY Adds USDC to Institutional Custody Platform in Expanded Circle Partnership
item.description: BNY, the world's largest custodian bank with $59.4 trillion in assets under custody, has made USDC the first stablecoin on its Digital Asset Custody platform, enabling institutional clients to store, transfer, mint, and redeem Circle's dollar-pegged token alongside traditional assets.
